verse.name: v1
verse.lines: More Love, More Power, More of You in my life. More Love, More Power More of You in my life.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I will worship You with all of my heart. And I will worship You with all of my mind. And I will worship You with all of my strength. For you are my Lord. You are my Lord.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: More Faith, More Compassion, More of You in my life. More Faith, More Compassion, More of You in my life.
